title: reynosia guama
intro: Reynosia guama, also known as the guama tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rhamnaceae, native to Central and South America. The medicinal properties of Reynosia guama lie in its leaves, bark, and roots, which are used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Reynosia guama can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to create topical creams and ointments.
